meaning: adj.液体比重计的,液体比重测定的
examples: The hydrometric pendulum is sometimes used to determine flow velocities in open channels.
This article elaborates signal transmission, selection of insulators for hydrometric cableway of Yifeng hydrological station in Jiangxi.
As a kind of linear motor, linear force motor usually is used as an actuator in positioning or switching control system for hydrometric servo valves and so on.
Comparisons are made with proglacial stream 2 discharges recorded at the main hydrometric station.
